name: nexus-console
description: Local web console for managing multiple CLI AI Agent instances in parallel

scripts.dev: pnpm run build:web && NEXUS_PROJECT_DIR=$PWD tsx packages/server/src/cli.ts
scripts.build: pnpm run build:web && pnpm run build:server
scripts.postinstall:
node -e "try{require('node-pty')}catch(e){console.error('
⚠️  node-pty native module failed to build.
Please run: cd node_modules/node-pty && npx node-gyp rebuild
Or ensure Xcode Command Line Tools are installed: xcode-select --install
');process.exit(1)}"
